boundary.note: These XAI metrics provide cases and evidence for HCI materials. They do not replace the required human study on understanding, trust calibration, verification behavior, safety/control, and cognitive load.

condition_a_summary_only.purpose: Compact summary-only view for comparison condition A.

evidence: Private replay refs exist on VPS for all displayed traces: left=3, right=3.
condition_b_evidence_limitation_action.limitation: This case is selected from high-divergence Phase 3 labels and should be used as an HCI presentation case, not as a prevalence estimate over all tasks.
condition_b_evidence_limitation_action.purpose: Evidence + limitation + action view for comparison condition B.
condition_b_evidence_limitation_action.suggested_verification_action: Inspect the listed trace summaries and, when needed, the VPS private audit/raw replay refs before accepting the agent outcome.

measurement_items.item: I can explain what differed between the two agent runs.
My trust in the agent result matches the evidence and limitations shown.
What would you do next?
measurement_items.scale: choice: accept / inspect evidence / rerun / ask for more information / reject

measurement_items.item: I feel able to catch or recover from an agent mistake in this case.
This presentation was understandable without excessive effort.
What evidence helped, what was confusing, and what would change your decision?

cases.task_prompt_excerpt: calckit/stats.py 的 mean 對空序列會 raise ValueError，但沒有測試覆蓋。請在 tests/test_mean_errors.py 新增 pytest 測試，用 pytest.raises(ValueError) 斷言 mean([]) 會拋出 ValueError。用你的工具建立檔案。

cases.task_prompt_excerpt: calckit/money.py 的 format_amount 對負數金額格式化錯誤，目前會遺失負號。 請修正 format_amount，使負數保留負號，且不破壞零與正數格式化。 只改 calckit/ 下的程式，用你的工具編輯檔案。

cases.task_prompt_excerpt: calckit/money.py 的 format_amount 缺少對負數與零的測試。請在 tests/test_format_extra.py 新增 pytest 測試，至少涵蓋 format_amount(0) 與一個負數金額（例如 format_amount(-12.5)）。 用你的工具建立檔案。

cases.task_prompt_excerpt: 請在 calckit/stats.py 的 mean 內加入 logging：以 logger.debug 記錄輸入序列長度 （log 訊息需含 "mean" 字樣）。不可改變回傳值。logger 用 logging.getLogger(__name__)。

procedure_support.design: within-subject comparison, counterbalance condition order if feasible
procedure_support.ethics: voluntary, anonymous/code-based, no grade penalty, raw individual responses not published
procedure_support.participants: small voluntary convenience sample, target n=6-10 MIS graduate students or peers

source.selection: Representative 4-6 case mix required by HCI human-study plan.
